name: Tool: Enviar Recado ao Time Humano

parameters.query:
SELECT
  tenant_code,
  schema_name,
  COALESCE(full_name, organization_name, tenant_code) AS owner_name,
  COALESCE(assistant_persona_name, full_name, tenant_code) AS ai_assistant_name,
  COALESCE(
    NULLIF(organization_metadata->>'human_handoff_email', ''),
    NULLIF(organization_metadata->>'recados_email', ''),
    NULLIF(organization_metadata->>'escalation_email', ''),
    NULLIF(organization_metadata->>'report_email', ''),
    NULLIF(organization_metadata->>'email', ''),
    'contato@bahiatecnologia.com.br'
  ) AS team_email,
  COALESCE(
    NULLIF(organization_metadata->>'human_handoff_whatsapp', ''),
    NULLIF(organization_metadata->>'recados_whatsapp', ''),
    NULLIF(organization_metadata->>'escalation_whatsapp', ''),
    NULLIF(organization_metadata->>'support_whatsapp', ''),
    NULLIF(organization_phone, '')
  ) AS team_whatsapp
FROM clinicas.tenants
WHERE schema_name = $1::text
LIMIT 1;
